Eligibility Determination
✓ EAP Eligible
✓ All eligibility criteria met for Emerging Adult Program (EAP). Diversion offer is recommended.
✓
Age 18–25 (Emerging Adult threshold)
Defendant is 22 years old — within EAP range

Simple drug possession, M.G.L. c.94C § 34 — EAP eligible

Program capacity available
Roca (primary match): 2 open slots · Chelsea Collaborative: 6 open slots
Incident Summary

Defendant was stopped at 7:42 PM on Broadway Ave, Revere during a routine foot patrol. Officer observed defendant in exchange with an unknown individual. Upon approach and consent search, Officer Chen recovered a small quantity of marijuana (approx. 8g) in defendant's jacket pocket. Defendant was cooperative and provided ID without resistance.

Source: Officer citation · ID: RPD-2026-03847 · Verified against MEA ingestion

Recommended Programs
💊 SOS — Services Over Sentences
Suffolk County DA · 17 slots available · 90-day drug treatment · Life Coach assigned within 72hr · Best match for substance-related offenses
🏠 Roca — Emerging Adult Services
Revere, MA · 2 slots available · 90-day engagement · Recovery Coach assigned within 72hr · Best match for drug-related offenses
🤝 Chelsea Collaborative
Chelsea, MA · 6 slots available · 60-day engagement · Community service + counseling · Transportation stipend available
🏥 Suffolk Recovery Services
Boston, MA · 4 slots available · Clinical track · Substance use evaluation + peer support
